exceptions.rationale: The vulnerable stringify path is transitive build tooling and HoReCa KZ does not accept or stringify untrusted CSS. npm audit currently proposes a forced downgrade to Next.js 9.3.3, which is incompatible and creates greater security and reliability risk.
mitigations: Keep Dependency Review, Dependabot and weekly audit enabled
Upgrade Next.js/PostCSS as soon as a compatible patched dependency graph is available
